title: Ondas Partners With Heidelberg For European Drone Defense
summary: Ondas Inc. shares are down on Wednesday. The company announced a joint venture with Heidelberger Druckmaschinen AG to create ONBERG Autonomous Systems. The deal aims at advancing European drone defense systems. Details The joint venture formalizes a Memorandum of Understanding signed in December 2025. title: Ondas Targets European Growth With Davos Deployment And ONBERG Drone Defense
summary: Ondas Holdings (NasdaqCM:ONDS) deployed its Sentrycs Cyber-over-RF counter-drone system at the World Economic Forum 2026 in Davos, supporting security operations at the high-profile gathering. The company also launched ONBERG, a joint venture with Heidelberg focused on producing autonomous drone defense systems for European customers. title: Beyond Defense: Drone ETFs Flying High Amid the Middle East Crisis
summary: Drone-focused ETFs like JEDI gain traction as the Middle East conflict boosts demand for UAV makers, highlighting a shift in defense investing strategies.
